'''鈭歡-d-zh''' ('''kagadazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:certify|certify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-d-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:certify|certify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-d-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kagadazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigadazh|thigadazh]] || [[word:jigadazh|jigadazh]] || [[word:shigadazh|shigadazh]] || [[word:kigadazh|kigadazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugadazh|thuthugadazh]] || [[word:jujugadazh|jujugadazh]] || [[word:shushugadazh|shushugadazh]] || [[word:kukugadazh|kukugadazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugadazh|thugadazh]] || [[word:jugadazh|jugadazh]] || [[word:shugadazh|shugadazh]] || [[word:kugadazh|kugadazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugadazh|thugadazh]] || [[word:jugadazh|jugadazh]] || [[word:shugadazh|shugadazh]] || [[word:kugadazh|kugadazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegadazh|thegadazh]] || [[word:jegadazh|jegadazh]] || [[word:shegadazh|shegadazh]] || [[word:kegadazh|kegadazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogadazh|thothogadazh]] || [[word:jojogadazh|jojogadazh]] || [[word:shoshogadazh|shoshogadazh]] || [[word:kokogadazh|kokogadazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogadazh|thogadazh]] || [[word:jogadazh|jogadazh]] || [[word:shogadazh|shogadazh]] || [[word:kogadazh|kogadazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogadazh|thogadazh]] || [[word:jogadazh|jogadazh]] || [[word:shogadazh|shogadazh]] || [[word:kogadazh|kogadazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gadazh|th忙gadazh]] || [[word:j忙gadazh|j忙gadazh]] || [[word:sh忙gadazh|sh忙gadazh]] || [[word:k忙gadazh|k忙gadazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagadazh|thathagadazh]] || [[word:jajagadazh|jajagadazh]] || [[word:shashagadazh|shashagadazh]] || [[word:kakagadazh|kakagadazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagadazh|thagadazh]] || [[word:jagadazh|jagadazh]] || [[word:shagadazh|shagadazh]] || [[word:kagadazh|kagadazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagadazh|thagadazh]] || [[word:jagadazh|jagadazh]] || [[word:shagadazh|shagadazh]] || [[word:kagadazh|kagadazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagadazh|shagadazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagadazh|goshagadazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagadazh|gokishagadazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagadazhn眉|shagadazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagadazhnkn眉|goshagadazhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadazhn眉|gokishagadazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagadazhsh毛|shagadazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagadazhnksh毛|goshagadazhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagadazhsh毛|gokishagadazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadazhro|shagadazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadazhnkro|goshagadazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadazhro|gokishagadazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadazhmu|shagadazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadazhnkmu|goshagadazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadazhmu|gokishagadazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagadazhsher|shagadazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagadazhnksher|goshagadazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagadazhsher|gokishagadazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagadazhng|shagadazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagadazhnkng|goshagadazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagadazhng|gokishagadazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagadazhya|shagadazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagadazhnkya|goshagadazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagadazhya|gokishagadazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagadazhyam|shagadazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagadazhnkyam|goshagadazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagadazhyam|gokishagadazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadazhn眉sh毛|shagadazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadazhnkn眉sh毛|goshagadazhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadazhn眉sh毛|gokishagadazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadazhn眉ro|shagadazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadazhnkn眉ro|goshagadazhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadazhn眉ro|gokishagadazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadazhn眉mu|shagadazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadazhnkn眉mu|goshagadazhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadazhn眉mu|gokishagadazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadazhsh毛n眉|shagadazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadazhnksh毛n眉|goshagadazhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadazhsh毛n眉|gokishagadazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadazhsh毛ro|shagadazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadazhnksh毛ro|goshagadazhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadazhsh毛ro|gokishagadazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadazhsh毛mu|shagadazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadazhnksh毛mu|goshagadazhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadazhsh毛mu|gokishagadazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadazhron眉|shagadazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadazhnkron眉|goshagadazhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadazhron眉|gokishagadazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadazhrosh毛|shagadazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadazhnkrosh毛|goshagadazhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadazhrosh毛|gokishagadazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadazhromu|shagadazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadazhnkromu|goshagadazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadazhromu|gokishagadazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadazhmun眉|shagadazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadazhnkmun眉|goshagadazhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadazhmun眉|gokishagadazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadazhmush毛|shagadazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadazhnkmush毛|goshagadazhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadazhmush毛|gokishagadazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadazhmuro|shagadazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadazhnkmuro|goshagadazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadazhmuro|gokishagadazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
